steps.title: Test each table
steps.content: For the shared $x$-values, the boundary values are $$4(2)+8=16,$$ $$4(4)+8=24,$$ and $$4(6)+8=32.$$ The listed $y$-values must be greater than $16$, $24$, and $32$, respectively.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: The correct table has $x$-values $2$, $4$, and $6$ paired with $y$-values $19$, $30$, and $41$. Each listed $y$-value is greater than the matching boundary value: $$19\gt 16,$$ $$30\gt 24,$$ and $$41\gt 32.$$ The other tables fail at least one row, so A is correct.
